query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as totale_attivi,
  SUM(CASE WHEN source = 'lista2' OR source = 'import_lista2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista2,
  SUM(CASE WHEN source != 'lista2' AND source != 'import_lista2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as lista1
FROM subscribers 
WHERE status = 'active';
